puzzle.title: The Warden of the Unquenchable Flame
puzzle.intro: A figure stands at the threshold of the most feared place in the unseen, entrusted with a duty no other being desires. When suffering souls cry out for mercy, a stern response echoes through the chambers of fire. Can you uncover the identity of this eternal guardian?
clues: I stand at the entrance of a terrifying place of punishment in the unseen.
A blazing, unquenchable fire is the centerpiece of my solemn duty.
Suffering souls call out my name, begging for relief from their endless torment.
When they plead, I declare that they shall not leave, ever.
I am not human, nor jinn — I am a created being of pure obedience.
I am the chief angel appointed as the eternal guardian of the Hellfire.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Malik
Jibreel
Mikael
Harut
Marut

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: The people of Hell plead for their torment to be ended
The trumpet is blown to signal the Day of Judgment
The Quran is revealed to the Prophet's heart
A Prophet is cast into a great fire by their people
A mighty wall is built to contain a corrupted nation
trial.answer: The people of Hell plead for their torment to be ended

location.label: Key Element
options: The Hellfire (Jahannam)
The Lote Tree at the boundary of Paradise
A piercing trumpet
A staff that transforms into a serpent
A magnificent divine throne

outcome.label: Outcome
options: The dwellers of Hell are told they will remain eternally
The dwellers of Hell are forgiven and released
The dwellers of Hell are granted a second chance at faith
The dwellers of Hell are moved to a place of coolness
The dwellers of Hell are completely destroyed by a thunderbolt
outcome.answer: The dwellers of Hell are told they will remain eternally

puzzle.arabic: وَنَادَوْا۟ يَـٰمَـٰلِكُ لِيَقْضِ عَلَيْنَا رَبُّكَ ۖ قَالَ إِنَّكُم مَّـٰكِثُونَ
puzzle.verse: And they will call, "O Mālik, let your Lord put an end to us!" He will say, "Indeed, you will remain." (43:77)
